subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book proclaimeth: On this Day all things are manifest with such joy that pens are powerless and unable to describe it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب میفرماید امروز جمیع اشیا بفرحی ظاهر که اقلام از ذکرش عاجز و قاصر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
